description: Unified runtime conversion-admission composition (defect 4/8 of the AST-dispatch/source-pin correction): one committed production path binds package version + module import origin + source-digest pin + dispatch-selected conversion verification, with adversarial integration tests. Fails closed on the source-digest INDEPENDENCE gate, so it blocks live until upstream-independent digests are established. Aggregate-only.

binds_in_one_path: dispatch-selected conversion exact verification (verify_dispatch_conversion on the live get_checkpoint_conversion_mapping object)

residual_blockers.source_digest_independence: the composition REQUIRES expected_digests_independent=True; live it must remain False until the expected sha256 are derived from an INDEPENDENT upstream artifact (wheel/sdist/commit/blob), not the installed bytes -> the unified composition currently BLOCKS live (fail-closed), which is correct
residual_blockers.gptq_runtime_tuple: Optimum / GPTQModel+Defuser (BACKEND.GPTQ_TORCH) required for the differentiable activation-autograd fixture -- runtime-tuple/install decision flagged for the operator
residual_blockers.then: differentiable fixture; Phase-0 conjunction; weights; authorized GPU transition; exact forward + activation VJP/JVP parity; lens fit

privacy: aggregate-only; booleans + public library version, no host/private digests, tensor values, weights, caches, or local paths
